OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. Now, It stands out as a prominent distributor of super-hit Nepali movie entertainment content on its YouTube channel in the country. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
snippet.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

snippet.title: मंदिर के सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगू | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan | Naga Navtra | Paru Rabari
snippet.description:
यह गीत 1960 के सुनहरे दौर की याद दिलाता है — जब प्यार में सादगी थी, जज़्बात में गहराई थी और हर शब्द में एक कहानी छिपी होती थी।
इस गाने के ज़रिए हम उसी पुराने दौर की महक को आज के सुरों में फिर से ज़िंदा करने की कोशिश कर रहे हैं।

💫 “Old is not just gold… it’s emotion.” 💫

⇨Song : मंदिर के सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगू | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan
⇨ : Naga Navtra / Paru Rabari

snippet.title: Saraswati Mantra | Om Saraswati Namo Namah | Saraswati Vandana | Saraswati Puja | Master Your Mind
snippet.description:
Experience the divine power of the Saraswati Mantra, a sacred Vedic chant dedicated to Goddess Saraswati—the eternal source of wisdom, intelligence, creativity, and clarity of thought. This mantra is traditionally known to enhance learning, focus, communication skills, and decision-making abilities, which are essential foundations for achieving success in modern life, including career growth, financial planning, and wealth creation.

In today’s fast-paced world of technology, luxury lifestyle, high-performance careers, and global financial markets, mental clarity and disciplined thinking are more valuable than ever. Regular listening to the Saraswati Mantra helps calm the mind, sharpen analytical skills, and align your thoughts toward positive outcomes. A focused mind is crucial for excelling in investment strategies, stock market analysis, business leadership, entrepreneurship, and long-term financial stability.

Many successful individuals across the world believe that spiritual discipline complements material growth. When your mind is balanced, you make wiser choices—whether it’s related to personal finance, wealth management, real estate investment, or building assets that support a premium lifestyle. Listening to this mantra during meditation, work, or study can support better concentration, improved productivity, and confident communication—skills valued in corporate careers, high-income professions, and global businesses.

This devotional audio is ideal for those aspiring to grow in financial wealth, career success, and intellectual excellence, while remaining spiritually grounded. It resonates strongly with audiences interested in luxury cars, automobiles, high-end brands, financial freedom, passive income, and smart money habits. A calm and intelligent mindset also supports better judgment when dealing with banking, insurance, mutual funds, cryptocurrency awareness, and international investments.

Listening to the Saraswati Mantra daily can inspire discipline, creativity, and confidence—qualities that align naturally with success in business growth, startup ecosystems, digital marketing, global employment opportunities, and lifestyle goals. Whether you are a student, professional, entrepreneur, or investor, this mantra helps cultivate inner strength that supports both spiritual peace and material progress.

🌸 Listen with devotion
🌸 Chant along or play during work or meditation
🌸 Maintain a positive intention for knowledge, growth, and prosperity

May Goddess Saraswati bless you with wisdom that leads to meaningful success, balanced wealth, and a fulfilled life

Title :- Saraswati Mantra
Singer, Composition, Lyrics :- Sohini mishra 
Rhythm :- Shreedhara Chari, Shashikant Sharma 
Flute :- Sandip Kulkarni 
Sitar :- Umashankar Shukla 
Programming :- Raju rao 
Recorded at :- DAC Studio 
Recordist and Mix Mastered by :- Himanshu Dipak
Video :- Mindpro Agency

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

🎶 𝑺𝑶𝑵𝑮 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑫𝑰𝑻𝑺 :-

Lyrics: Kunaal Vermaa

©️ Koo Koo Tv

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein
Na raaton ko neendein aayein
Aate hain phir khwab kyu
Aate hain kyu khaab
Jo thi tere ishq mein doobi
Un ankhon mein tum le aaye
Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Humne wahin lagaya dil
Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha
Kyu us gali mein rehte they hum
Jahaan roz jaana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

baitho kisi roz tanhai mein
Rakho samne wakt ke aaine
Jo aagea chehra nazar vo kahin
Tumhe bewafa kehke has na pade

Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe
Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe

Humne jalaaya dil jahaan diye bhi jalaana mana tha
Kar baithe yaad vo chehra jisko bhulaana mana tha
Hum aazmaye gaye magar unhe aazmana mana tha
Humne wahin lagaya dil jahan dil lagana mana tha

This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits 2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe
Singer- Shobi Sarwan 
Lyricist- Dinesh Kumar & Tarun Chaudhary 
Music - Bunny Beats
Video & Digital Publicity Design - GDTM Studios
Producer - Mr A 
Digital Partner: Reverv 
Social Media Promotions : Reverv

Music Label : Ayaan Records
Copyrights Holder : Nanu Culture
Ph - 8171465723

YT Topic : https://bit.ly/46GfOB1
JioSaavn : https://bit.ly/45ir586
Spotify : https://bit.ly/4lbp044
Apple : https://bit.ly/45xzx4N
Gaana : https://bit.ly/4mq7MRd
Amazon Prime : https://bit.ly/4m41G9y
YouTube Music : https://bit.ly/3UKOiuQ

Lyrical -

तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

This song blends nostalgic romance with new-age sound, creating a melody that touches the heart and revives golden memories.

🎧 Vibe: Old is Gold – 90s Bollywood Romantic
🎤 Vocals: Male & Female Duet

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Qubool (Full Video) | Haq | Vishal Mishra | Armaan Khan | Yami Gautam & Emraan Hashmi | Hindi Song
snippet.description:
Times Music presents the official full video song “Qubool” from the movie Haq. With heartfelt lyrics & soulful vocals, Qubool captures the raw essence of love.

Whether you're in love, healing, or simply a fan of meaningful love songs, 'Qubool' is a song that speaks to the heart. It's the kind of track you’ll want to put on repeat.

#Qubool #HAqSongs #LoveSong #RomanticSong #NewSong #TrendingSong #YamiGautam #EmraanHashmi #VishalMishra #ArmaanKhan #QuboolHai #NewTrendingSong  #DekhoZaraDekhoNaamTeraLikhaHai

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

Cast- Yami Gautam, Emraan Hashmi, Vartika Singh, Danish Husain, Sheeba Chadha, Aseem Hattangady
Directed by- Suparn S Varma
Produced by- Vineet Jain
Produced by- Vishal Gurnani, Juhi Parekh Mehta, Harman Baweja
Co-Produced by- Amrita Pandey, Suparn S Varma, Rowena Baweja, Sandeep Singh
Written by- Reshu Nath | Music by - Vishal Mishra

Song Credits 
Composer : Vishal Mishra
Lyrics : Kaushal Kishore
Singer : Armaan Khan 
Arrangement & Production : Vishal Mishra
Music Production by : Gaurav Vaswani
Additional Production : Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah
Additional Vocals - Vishal Mishra 
Music Assistant : Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah
Mixed & Mastered by : Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

Bass : Aalaap Raju
Strokes : Tapas Roy
Acoustic Guitar : Kandarpa Kalita
Live Rhythm Arranged by : Prashant Sonagra & Swaranjay Dhumal
Tabla : Prashant Sonagra
Dholak : Mushtak Khan & Ishteyak Khan
Percussions : Swaranjay Dhumal, Prashant Sonagra, Harsh Bhoir & Mohit Kathak

Live Rhythms, Strokes Recorded at YRF Studio by : Vijay Dayal, Sagar Sathe
Guitars, Vocals Recorded at VMS by : Trihangku Lahkar & Bitupon Boruah

Lyrics Of Song ‘Qubool’
 
Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

Stream on:
Insta - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1184603513718339
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/2SWCNQhb4xwETMbIxgdQUC
Amazon Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B0FWCK7Z7D?trackAsin=B0FWCK2H2F

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Hunters REVIVAL
snippet.description:
You voted for it. Time to take on 5 hunters. The hunters are back and better than ever. Will we AT LAST move on to 6 hunters?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dream

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there is FIVE hunters. The 6th rendition of the 5 hunters series, the revival...

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friends George and Sapnap and BadBoyHalo and Antfrost  and Awesamdude try to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

(Most) Music is from: @dreamproductionsXD 

#MinecraftManhunt

uk.title: Майнкрафт Спідранер проти 5 Мисливців ВІДРОДЖЕННЯ
uk.description:
Ви проголусували за це. Час взятися за 5 мислівців.  Мисливці повернулись кращі, ніж будь коли. Чи ми НАРЕШТІ дійдемо до 6 мисливців?

Слідкуйте за моїми соціальними мережами:
➽ Twitter - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Сід: 935327412
Версія: 1.21.11

Ми вирішили назвати ці серії Майнкрафт Менхантом. Це відео це інша інтерпретація, де є П'ЯТЬ мисливці. Це 6 версія серії з 5 мисливцями, відродження...

Це новий Майнкрафт, але 1.21.10 виклик що ми вирішили спробувати. Я намагаюсь пройти гру, поки мої друзі Джордж і Сепнеп і БедБойХало і Антфрост і Авсемдуд намагаються не дати мені цього зробити. Це перегони і вони дуже інтенсивні і ми мали над чим посміятись. Люблю займатись цими викликами. 

(Більшість) Музики з:   @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

de.title: Minecraft Speedrunner gegen 5 Jäger NEUAUFLAGE
de.description:
Ihr habt abgestimmt. Zeit um es mit 5 Jägern aufzunehmen. Die Jäger sind zurück und sie sind besser denn je. Werden wir ENDLICH zu 6 Jägern aufsteigen?

Folge mir auf Social Media:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

Wir haben diese Serie "Minecraft Manhunt" genannt. Dieses Video ist eine etwas andere Version davon: Es gibt FÜNF Jäger. Die sechste Auflage der 5 Jäger Serie, die Neuauflage...

Das ist eine neue "Minecraft, aber" Herausforderung, in Version 1.21.10, die wir ausprobieren. Ich versuche, das Spiel zu besiegen, während meine Freunde George und Sapnap und BadBoyHalo und Antfrost und Awesamdude versuchen, mich daran zu hindern. Es ist ein Wettlauf, super spannend und wir haben jede Menge gelacht. Ich liebe diese Herausforderungen.


Die (meiste) Musik ist von: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

ms.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Hunters – REVIVAL
ms.description:
Korang dah vote untuk video kali ni. Masa untuk lawan 5 hunters.
Hunters kali ni kembali dan lagi padu dari sebelum ni.
Persoalannya… adakah kali ni akhirnya kita akan sambung ke 6 hunters?

Follow socials aku:
➽ Twitter – @Dream
➽ Instagram – @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat – @Dream

Hunters:
BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

Kami decide nak panggil series ni Minecraft Manhunt. Video ni versi lain sikit, kali ni dengan LIMA hunters. Ini comback siri 5 hunters, versi ke-6 — the revival.

Ini challenge Minecraft but, yang baru versi 1.21.11 yang kami nak cuba. Aku kena beat Minecraft, sementara kawan-kawan aku George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo, Antfrost dengan Awesamdude cuba halang aku. Ini persaingan yang intense gila dan banyak momen kelakar. Aku sangat enjoy buat challenge macam ni.

(Hampir semua) muzik dari: @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

el.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Κυνηγούς ΑΝΑΓΈΝΝΗΣΗ
el.description:
Το ψηφήσατε. Ώρα να αντιμετωπίσουμε 5 κυνηγούς. Οι κυνηγοί επέστρεψαν και είναι καλύτεροι από ποτέ. Θα προχωρήσουμε ΕΠΙΤΈΛΟΥΣ στους 6 κυνηγούς;

Ακολουθήστε τα social μου:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:   @thesaintsofgames
George:   @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:   @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

Αποφασίσαμε να ονομάσουμε αυτή τη σειρά Minecraft Manhunt. Αυτό το βίντεο είναι μια διαφορετική έκδοσή της, οπού υπάρχουν ΠΈΝΤΕ κυνηγοί. Η 6η έκδοση από την σειρά με τους 5 κυνηγούς, η αναγέννηση...

Αυτό είναι μία καινούργια Minecraft αλλά, 1.21.11 πρόκληση που αποφασίσαμε να δοκιμάσουμε. Εγώ προσπαθώ να τερματίσω το παιχνίδι, ενώ οι φίλοι μου George και Sapnap και BadBoyHalo και Antfrost και Awesamdude προσπαθούν να με εμποδίσουν από το να το κάνω. Είναι ένας αγώνας, και είναι πολύ έντονος και γελάσαμε πολύ. Αγαπώ να κάνω αυτές τις προκλήσεις.

Η (περισσότερη) μουσική είναι από: ​ ​⁠    @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

ja.title: 【マイクラ】スピードランナー VS ５人のハンター 【リバイバル】
ja.description:
みんなの投票で決まった。５人のハンターに再挑戦。ハンターたちは帰ってきて前より強くなって。果たして今回は、ついに６人目のハンターへ進めるのか？

▼SNS はこちら 
➽ Twitter - @Dream 
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken 
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

George:   @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:   @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
Awesamdude:   @Awesamdude

このシリーズは「Minecraft Manhunt」と呼ぶことにしました。今回はハンター5人で
のリマッチ。「5人ハンターシリーズ」の６回目、リバイバルです。 

これはマイクラの新チャレンジ、 バージョン1.21.11です。 ゲームクリアを目指す僕
を、GeorgeとSapnapとBadBoyHaloとAntfrostとAwesamdude がそれを阻止しに来ます。 レースで、めちゃくちゃドキドキ！笑いもいっぱいで、こういうチャレンジ、大好きで す。

tr.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Avcı YENİDEN
tr.description:
Siz oy verdiniz. 5 avcıya karşı mücadele zamanı. Avcılar geri döndü ve her zamankinden daha iyiler. Sonunda 6 avcıya geçebilecek miyiz?

Bu seriye Minecraft Manhunt adını vermeye karar verdik. Bu video, beş avcının olduğu farklı bir versiyonudur. 5 Avcı serisinin 6. versiyonu, yeniden...

Bu, denemeye karar verdiğimiz yeni bir Minecraft 1.21.11 meydan okuması. Ben oyunu bitirmeye çalışırken, arkadaşlarım George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo, Antfrost ve Awesamdude beni engellemeye çalışıyor. Bu bir yarış ve çok heyecanlıydı, çok eğlendik. Bu meydan okumaları yapmayı çok seviyorum.

hi.title: Minecraft स्पीडरनर VS 5 हंटर की वापसी
hi.description:
आपने इसके लिए वोट किया था। अब 5 शिकारियों का सामना करने का समय है। शिकारी वापस लौटे हैं, पहले से भी बेहतर। क्या हम आखिरकार 6 तक आगे बढ़ पाएंगे?

मेरे सोशल मीडिया को follow करें:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

हमने इसे “Minecraft Manhunt” सीरीज़ कहने का तय किया था। यह वीडियो इसका एक अलग संस्करण है, जहाँ 5 हंटर्स हैं। 5 हंटर्स सीरीज़ का छठा संस्करण...

यह एक नया Minecraft 'But' है और 1.21.11 की चुनौती है, जिसे हमने आज़माने का फ़ैसला किया था। मैं गेम को पूरा करने की कोशिश करता हूँ, जबकि मेरे दोस्त George और Sapnap और BadBoyHalo और Antfrost और Awesamdude मुझे रोकने की कोशिश करते हैं। यह एक बहुत ही तीव्र रेस है, जिसमें हमें बहुत मज़ा आया था। मुझे ऐसे चैलेंज करना बहुत पसंद है।

(ज़्यादातर) म्यूज़िक यहाँ से है:
@DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

আমরা এ সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। এই ভিডিও তারই পুনর চেষ্টা, যেখানে ৫ জন হান্টার আছে। ৫ হান্টারের ষষ্ঠ খেলা পুনরলড়াই...

এটা মাইনক্রাফট কিন্তু, ১.২১.১১ এর একটি চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । আমি গেমটি হারানোর চেষ্টা করব। যখন আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবইহেলো এবং অ্যানফ্রস্ট আমাকে থামানোর চেষ্টা করবে। এটা একটা প্রতিযোগিতা এবং ‌ এটা অত্যন্ত তুখোর আর আমরা এটা করে অনেক মজা পেয়েছিলাম । আমি এরকম চ্যালেঞ্জ করতে পছন্দ করি।

Това е ново Minecraft, но 1.21.11 предизвикателство, което решихме да опитаме. Опитвам се да превъртя играта, докато моите приятели George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo, Antfrost и Awesamdude се опитват да ме спрат. Супер интензивна надпревара е и се забавлявахме доста. Обичам да правя тези предизвикателства.

(Повечето) Музика е взета от: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

te.title: మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ స్పీడ్‌రన్నర్ VS 5 హంటర్స్ పునరుద్ధరణ
te.description:
మీరు దీనికి ఓటు వేశారు. 5 మంది వేటగాళ్లను ఎదుర్కోవాల్సిన సమయం ఆసన్నమైంది. వేటగాళ్ళు తిరిగి వచ్చారు మరియు గతంలో కంటే మెరుగ్గా ఉన్నారు. మనం చివరికి 6 మంది వేటగాళ్ల వైపు వెళ్తామా?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

ఈ సిరీస్‌కి మేము Minecraft Manhunt అని పేరు పెట్టాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. ఈ వీడియో దాని యొక్క భిన్నమైన వెర్షన్, ఇక్కడ ఐదుగురు వేటగాళ్ళు ఉన్నారు. 5 వేటగాళ్ళు సిరీస్ యొక్క 6వ వెర్షన్, పునరుద్ధరణ...

ఇది కొత్త Minecraft కానీ, 1.21.11 సవాలును మేము ప్రయత్నించాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. నేను ఆటను ఓడించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాను, అయితే నా స్నేహితులు జార్జ్ మరియు సప్నాప్ మరియు బాడ్‌బాయ్‌హాలో మరియు ఆంట్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్ నన్ను దీన్ని చేయకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు. ఇది ఒక రేసు, మరియు ఇది చాలా తీవ్రమైనది మరియు మేము చాలా నవ్వుకున్నాము. నాకు ఈ సవాళ్లను చేయడం చాలా ఇష్టం.

(Most) Music is from: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

cs.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Lovci OŽIVENÍ
cs.description:
Řekli jste si o to. Je čas se postavit 6 lovcům. Lovci jsou zpátky a jsou lepší, než kdykoli předtím. Přejdeme KONEČNĚ na 6 lovců?

Sledujte mé sociální sítě: 
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:   @thesaintsofgames
George:    @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:    @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Verze: 1.21.11

Rozhodli jsme se tuto sérii nazvat Minecraft Manhunt. Tohle video je jiné provedení, kde je PĚT lovců. 6. provedení série 5 lovcú, oživení… 

Tohle je nová “Minecraft, ale…” challenge v 1.21.11, kterou jsme se rozhodli vyzkoušet. Snažím se vyhrát, zatímco se mi to moji kamarádi George a Sapnap a BadBoyHalo a Antfrost a Awesamdude snaží překazit. Je to super intenzivní závod, během kterého jsme se hodně nasmáli. Zbožňuju tyto výzvy. 

Hudba je (převážně) z: ​⁠    @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

es.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Hunters EL RESURGIMIENTO
es.description:
Ustedes lo votaron. Es hora de enfrentarnos a 5 cazadores.
Los cazadores están de vuelta y mejor que nunca.
¿POR FIN pasaremos a 6 cazadores?

Sigue mis redes sociales:
 ➽Twitter - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Semilla: 935327412
Versión: 1.21.11

Decidimos llamar a esta serie Minecraft Manhunt.
Este video es una versión diferente, donde hay CINCO cazadores.
La sexta entrega de la serie de 5 cazadores, el resurgimiento...

En este reto de Minecraft 1.21.11, intento terminar el juego mientras mis amigos George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo y Antfrost hacen TODO lo posible por detenerme.
Es una carrera súper intensa, y llena de risas. Me encanta hacer estos retos.

(La mayoría) de la música es de: ⁠ @dreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

sv.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Jägare REVIVAL
sv.description:
Ni röstade på det. Dags att ta mig an 5 jägare. Jägarna är tillbaka och bättre än någonsin. Kommer vi ÄNTLIGEN ta oss till 6 jägare?

Följ mina sociala medier:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

Vi bestämde oss för att kalla den här serien Minecraft Manhunt. Den här videon är en annan version av 5 jägare serien, återupplivandet…

Det här är en ny Minecraft men, 1.21.11 utmaning som be har bestämt oss at pröva. Jag klarar spelet medan mina vänner George, Sapnap, Badboyhalo, Antfrost och Awesamdude försöker stimma mig från att göra det. Det är ett lopp, och det är super intensivt, och vi hade många skratt. Jag älskar att göra de här utmaningarna.

(Mest) Music är från: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

ta.title: மைன்கிராஃப்ட் ஸ்பீட்ரன்னர் vs 5 ஹண்டர்ஸ் மறுமலர்ச்சி
ta.description:
நீங்க அதுக்கு வாக்களிச்சுட்டீங்க. 5 வேட்டைக்காரர்களை எதிர்கொள்ள வேண்டிய நேரம் இது. வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் திரும்பி வந்துட்டாங்க, எப்பவும் இல்லாத அளவுக்கு நல்லா இருக்காங்க. கடைசியிலயாவது 6 வேட்டைக்காரர்களை நோக்கி போவோமா?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பு, இதில் ஐந்து வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் உள்ளனர். 5 வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் தொடரின் 6வது பதிப்பு, மறுமலர்ச்சி...

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர்கள் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் சப்னாப் மற்றும் BadBoyHalo மற்றும் Antfrost ஆகியோர் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வதை நான் விரும்புகிறேன்.

(Most) Music is from: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

fi.title: Minecraft Speedrunneri VS 5 Hunteria UUSINTA
fi.description:
Äänestitte sen puolesta. Aika haastaa 5 hunteria. Hunterit ovat palanneet ja parempina kuin koskaan. Siirrymmekö VIHDOINKIN kuuteen hunteriin? 

Seuraa minua somessa: 
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude 

Seed: 935327412 
Versio: 1.21.11

Päätimme nimetä tämän sarjan Minecraft Manhuntiksi. Tämä video on siitä erilainen versio, jossa on VIISI hunteria. 5 hunters -sarjan kuudes versio, uusinta...

Tämä on uusi Minecraft, mutta... 1.21.11 -haaste, jota päätimme kokeilla. Yritän päihittää pelin, samalla kun ystäväni George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo, Antfrost ja Awesamdude yrittävät estää minua tekemästä niin. Se on kilpailu, ja se on todella intensiivistä, ja me nauroimme paljon. Rakastan näiden haasteiden tekemistä.

Musiikki (suurin osa) on täältä: @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

pl.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Łowców POWTÓRKA
pl.description:
Zagłosowaliście. Czas na starcie z 5 łowcami. Łowcy powracają i są silniejsi niż kiedykolwiek dotąd. Czy uda nam się FINALNIE dotrzeć do 6 łowców?

Zaobserwuj mnie również na:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Wersja: 1.21.11

Zadecydowaliśmy nazwać tę serię Minecraft Manhunt. Ten film to inna wersja, w której występuje PIĘCIU łowców. Szósta odsłona serii 5 łowców, powtórka...

Jest to najnowszy "Minecraft, ale" gdzie wyzwanie jest z wersji 1.21.11, które postanowiliśmy podjąć. Próbuję przejść grę, a w tym czasie moi przyjaciele George i Sapnap oraz BadBoyHalo, Antfrost i Awesamdude próbują mnie powstrzymać. Jest to wyścig, który był bardzo intensywny i mieliśmy przy nim wielki ubaw. Uwielbiam podejmować takie wyzwania.

Muzyka (Większość) pochodzi z: ​⁠ @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

बेटी के खाना अब माईये रोज खाई

दामदा सासे के गाथता

दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2

snippet.title: सरस्वती मंत्र | Saraswati Mantra | ॐ सरस्वती नमो नमः | Om Saraswati Namo Namah | Saraswati Puja Song
snippet.description:
Title :- Om Saraswati Namo Namah
Singer :- Shubhangi Joshi
VFX :- Vision Graphics
Label :- Bhakti Vision Entertainment

"ॐ सरस्वती नमो नमः, 
माँ सरस्वती नमो नमः। 
विद्या दायिनी नमो नमः, 
हंस वाहिनी नमो नमः।"

Must Watch Videos:
►Beautiful 10 Krishna Bhajan: https://youtu.be/4SPO0UPsuGQ

►Purusha Suktam: https://youtu.be/9ZQkTZztMNY

►Sri Lalitha Sahasranamam: https://youtu.be/fmRkz-XGpg8

►Kanakdhara Stotram: https://youtu.be/Xs2Fsiqdlw4

►Mahamrityunjaya Mantra: https://youtu.be/DRYVWmWic0E

►Sri Vishnu Sahasranama: https://youtu.be/ptd8wYlhapY

►Shri Mahalaxmi Stotra: https://youtu.be/445wXcJQetk

►Shiva Sankalpa Suktam: https://youtu.be/NPjMr2rbzJE

►Hanuman Chalisa: https://youtu.be/V2-syNSbuRo

🎮 WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 BATTLE VERSE — ASIA CHAPTER III! 🎮

Asia’s ultimate PUBG MOBILE warzone is back — bigger, tougher, and loaded with nonstop action.
From January 8 to February 6, 27 elite squads clash across 3 intense phases to fight for glory, survival, and the crown.

Expect clutch plays, ruthless sprays, zone chaos, and insane momentum swings.
🔥 New legends will rise
🔥 Underdogs will surprise
🔥 Only ONE champion will conquer Chapter III

Gear up — the battle begins now.

TEAMS PLAYING (REGION-WISE)
🇮🇩 INDONESIA
BIGETRON BV • RRQ RYU • ALTER EGO ARES • GLU BLUG • 2K ESPORTS • TEAM PANDUM • BOOM ESPORTS • VOIN ESPORTS

🇳🇵 NEPAL
DRS GAMING • T2K ESPORTS • HORAA ESPORTS

ASi8 ESPORTS • AMINZ ESPORTS • 4THRIVES • TEAM WARGAYE • DEMON ESPORTS

🇲🇳 MONGOLIA
SKYFORCE • ALPHA GAMING

🇲🇲 Myanmar: 16:00 PM

PLAYOFFS

• 18 Teams • Single Lobby

• 18 Teams • Single Lobby

PLAYOFFS

snippet.title: Bizen - Mohani (Prod. by pozod)

A heartfelt tribute to the timeless classic “Simsimey Pani Ma”, by Rekha Shah. 
Crafted with love and respect.

Originally written and composed by Rekha Shah
Rendition wriiten and performed by Bizen
Prod. by pozod
Starring Cezal Gautam
Production Manager: Celine Prajapati
Assistant Manager: Biten Shrestha
Lights: Baba dai and team
Dance Crew: Ojaswi and team
MUA: Mandila Shrestha
Styled by Celine Prajapati
Assistant DOP: Ashish (Aurora Productions)
Directed, shot and edited by storenutter

Clothing partner: Huba
Venue partner: The Bar Room, Thamel
Accesories partner: Shine and Sparkle

Special Thanks to Kesang , Yangchen , Nima and Roshna

snippet.description:
Franklin play hide and kill with hulk - Indian bike driving 3D
Hello friends, in this video Franklin and Shinchan will play hide and kill with colorful Hulks and on the occasion of Republic Day, whoever wins will get a Ninja bike. I have done face cam. This is a fun video made with funny ministers.

snippet.title: 2 Minecraft Pros VS 1000 Hunters
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP, LettuceK is currently beating every other candidate in the election by 6,000 votes. The only way to beat him, is to bring Wemmbu back to spawn and prove that he's been lying this whole time. This is 2 Minecraft Pros VS 1000 Hunters. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  @wemmbumc 
➜ ‪  @FlameFragsMC 
➜ ‪  @Spokeishere 
➜ ‪  @ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @wemmbumc @LettuceK @TheobaldTheBird @CoinMonkeExtras @PurpledMC @Boosfer 

Original music by  @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: क्या Team CID पकड़ पाएगी Betting Addiction के रची साज़िश? | CID | New Season | 14 Jan 2026
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

A bank robbery in Mumbai leaves manager Rahul as the sole victim of a planned attack. As CID investigates, they uncover a web of betting addiction, abductor, and betrayal involving Rahul, his sister-in-law Kanchan, and others.

Show Name: CID Season 2 
Episode: 8
Cast: Shivaji Satam, Dayanand Shetty, Aditya Srivastava, Ansha Sayed, Ajay Nagrath, Saumya Saraswat, Narendra Gupta, Parul Rai
Director: Shachindra Vats, Santosh Shetty
Producer: Deepak Dhar, Rajesh Chadhaa

#CID #सीआईडी #crimethrillers #crimemysteries #mysteries #horror #newcid #crime #latestcid #setindia #newseason #latestepisode #newepisode #tvserial #hindiserial #hindishow #tvshow #investigation #thriller #livcrime #cidreturns #dayareturns #abhijeetreturns #cid2026 #cidisback #purvireturns      

About CID:
-----------------
India's favourite crime thriller show is back! Abhijeet, Daya and other CID officers, led by ACP Pradyuman, join forces with forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to track down the perpetrators who have committed heinous crimes, using every small clue they can find. 'CID' stars Shivaji Satam, Dayanand Shetty, Aditya Srivastava and Narendra Gupta.

Click here to enjoy full episodes of your favorite show CID 2.0:

snippet.title: अल्लारे नानी केसी "Allare Nani Kesi" Yubaraj Portel(Cover Remake) | Old is Gold | Music Nepal
snippet.description:
Experience a fresh take on the timeless Nepali folk classic, "Allare Nani Kesi." Originally composed and sung by the legendary Jhalakman Gandharva, this remake version is beautifully reimagined by Yubaraj Portel only on Music Nepal's Official YouTube Channel.

This version brings modern production while keeping the soulful essence of the Sarangi and the traditional Gandharva roots alive for a new generation.

"अल्लारे नानी" (Allare Nani Kesi) एउटा कालजयी नेपाली लोक गीत हो।  युवराज पोर्टेलको रिमेक संस्करण र झलकमान गन्धर्वको मौलिक (Original) संस्करणमा,

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats.
Enjoy the real taste of Nepali Lok Geet Dohori and regional music heritage. Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection, bringing together authentic Nepali folk sounds. Experience soulful traditional music with rich melodies and heartfelt folk emotions.  A beautiful blend of lok dohori and classic traditional rhythms that portray love, devotion, culture, and village life.  

• Song Title: Allare Nani Kesi

• Original Singer/Composer/Lyricist: Jhalakman Gandharva

• Remake Vocals: Yubaraj Portel

• Arranger: Binod Kumar Bhujel

• Studio = Music Nepal 

• Record = Nakul Karki 

• Mixing/ Mastering = Prakash Kharel, Gobinda Soni 

• Special help = Monika Chudal 

• Genre: Nepali Folk / Fusion

Video credits 
• Cast: Asha B.C.
          Bikki Portel
          Raju Singh 

• Co- Artist:
                  Raju century 
                  Bikram gahatraj 
                  Sunill dhamala
                  Nabin (Gold King) 
                  Sujan comrade 
                  N.B. Narayan Ghimire 
                  Shambhu lagun 

Special thanks -  Subash Khadka 

• Makeup: Poonam Chaudhary
• Light:
      Ramesh Parajuli 
      Harka Pahari 
      Anish mager 
• Cinematography: Dinesh Parajuli 
• Poster: Rakesh Dahal 
• Edit / Colour: Milan Bishwokarma 
• Producer: Trisha / Aryan 
• Choreographer: Shyam Pattel 
• Concept / Direction: Khem Nath Khanal

🎧 Label: Yubaraj Portel/Music Nepal
📅 Release Year: 2026
🌐 Category: Music

All Rights Reserved. 

Unauthorized downloading or duplication of this video may result in copyright claims or strikes by YouTube.

snippet.title: मेरे मन में भी शिव मेरे तन में भी शिव  Shiv Naam Bhajan  Shiva Bhakti Song  Shiv Dhun 2026
snippet.description:
#shivdhun #shivbhajan #mahadev 
मेरे मन में भी शिव मेरे तन में भी शिव  Shiv Naam Bhajan  Shiva Bhakti Song  Shiv Dhun
Nonstop Shiv Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Shiv Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Shiv Mere Mann Mein Bhi Shiv The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Shiva The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.
 Artist :- Riya Raj 
Music:- Kush Sanoj

📌 Keywords: Mere Tan Mein Bhi Shiv Mere Man Mein Bhi Shiv, Shiv Bhajan, Shiv Dhun, Mahadev Bhakti, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Shiva Meditation Song, Shiv Naam Jap, Om Namah Shivay, Powerful Shiv Dhun, Bajao Bhakti

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Qaafirana | Sushant Singh Rajput & Sara Ali Khan | Kedarnath | Full Video
snippet.description:
Song: Qaafirana
Movie: Kedarnath
Singers: Arijit Singh & Nikita Gandhi
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Music: Amit Trivedi
Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput (Remembering), Sara Ali Khan

Qaafirana Lyrics

Lyrics:

In vaadiyon mein
Takra chuke hain
Humse musafir
Yun toh kayi

Dil na lagaya
Humne kisi se
Qisse sune hain
Yun toh kayi

Aise tum mile ho 
Aise tum mile ho
Jaise mil rahi ho
Itr se havaa.. .. 

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

Aise tum mile ho 
Aise tum mile ho
Jaise mil rahi ho
Itr se havaa.. .. 

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

Godi mein pahadiyon ki
Ujli dopheri guzaarna
Tere saath mein..
Accha lage.. 

Dhalti huyi sham ne
Bataya hai ke door manzil pe
Raat Hai..

Mujhko tasalli hai yeh
Ke hone talak raat
Hum dono saath hai ..

Sang chal rahe hai
Sang chal rahe hai
Dhoop ke kinare
Chaaon ki tarah

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

Aise tum mile ho
Aise tum mile ho
Jaise mil rahi ho

Itr se havaa.. .. 

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (Lyrical Video) | Sonu Nigam | Alka Yagnik Anu Malik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" from the film Chori Chori Chupke Chupke is a melodious romantic track sung by Sonu Nigam and Alka Yagnik, with music composed by Anu Malik. Featuring Salman Khan and Rani Mukerji, the song captures the fluttering emotions of love, innocence, and heartfelt longing. With its soothing melody, expressive vocals, and early-2000s Bollywood charm, this track remains a memorable and evergreen romantic favorite. 

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Alka Yagnik
Music: Anu Malik
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
Starring: Salman Khan, Rani Mukerji
Director: Abbas Mustan
Producer: Nazim Rizvi
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Deewana Hain Yeh Man Kyon Pagal Hai Dhadkan 

Kyon Tujhpe Mujhe Pyaar Aaya Hai 

Yeh Mausam Kyon Saje Yeh Payal Kyon Baje 

Yeh Kaisa Khumar Chhaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Maine Teri Dhadkanon Pe Sanam 

Apni Wafa Ki Kahani Likhi 

Maine Tere Naam Jaan-e-Jigar 

Apni Haseen Zindagani Likhi 

Yeh Kajal Kyon Hase, Yeh Naina Kyon Jhuke 

Yeh Kaisa Nikhar Mujhpe Aaya Hain 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

O Mere Rabba Tera Shukriya 

Jo Maine Maanga Mujhe Mil Gaya 

Meri Mohabbat Asar Kar Gayi 

Khwabon Ka Mehka Chaman Khil Gaya 

Yeh Bandhan Kyon Bandhe, Yeh Rishte Kyon Jude 

Yeh Mausam Kya Sandesha Laaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Deewana Hain Yeh Man Kyon Pagal Hai Dhadkan 

Kyon Tujhpe Mujhe Pyaar Aaya Hai 

Yeh Mausam Kyon Saje Yeh Payal Kyon Baje 

Yeh Kaisa Khumar Chhaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 THE GRIND | Week 3 | Day 4
snippet.description:
Week 3 of The Grind is underway, and the race is starting to take real shape. With multiple weeks of action behind them, teams now know exactly where they stand. Every decision, every rotation, and every fight matters more than ever as the competition intensifies.

Group A:
iQOO ORANGUTAN
K9 Esports
iQOOSOUL
Infinix TrueRippers
Nebula Esports
OnePlus Gods Reign
Higgboson Esports
Madkings
iQOO RECKONING ESPORTS
iQOO8BIT
Team AX
Victores Sumus
Hero Xtreme Godlike
RAPID CHAOS ESPORTS
Blitz Esports
Autobotz Esports

Group B:
GENESIS ESPORTS
The Vanguard
Rising Esports
TWOB
EVOX Esports
Zutsu Esports
Wyld Fangs
SINEWY ESPORTS
4TR Official
NoNx Esports
TEAM X ESPORTS
LASTADE ESPORTS
The Knight Mobs
KALINGA ESPORTS
iQOO Team Tamilas
Team H4K

Expect high-pressure gameplay, sharper strategies, and moments that can shift the leaderboard in an instant. Whether teams are pushing to stay on top or fighting their way back into contention, this is where consistency and composure are truly tested.
Tune in, support your favourite teams, and watch the next chapter of BGIS 2026 unfold live.

Registrations for Rising Star 2026 are now open: https://bit.ly/RisingStar2026
Follow us on Instagram: https://instagram.com/KraftonIndiaEsports

snippet.title: Cobweb - Jay Nepal (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Band : COBWEB
Song : Jay Nepal 
Lyrics : Ashish Gurung, Divesh Mulmi
Studio : Sound Valley Records, Moksh, Musica Music Studio, Kamp22 Studio
Sound Technician : Abhisekh Pun 
Mix and Mastered by Divesh Mulmi

Lyrics:
  
जय नेपाल 

अग्रसिर हिमाल मुनि बसेको हाम्रो छाया
पवित्र हावाले रचेको यो लय 
बुनिएको छ एकतामा हाम्रो सेरोफेरो 
प्राण भन्दा प्यारो, यो देश मेरो

यो हाम्रो देश…चन्द्र र सूर्य, सगरमाथा साक्षी
मेची, कोशी, माहाकाली 

यो हाम्रो भेष…दौरा र सुरुवाल, ढाकाको टोपी 
पहिचान हाम्रो हामी नेपाली 

हो… बहुल जाति, बहुल भाषि, 
बुनिएका छौ एउटै आकाश मुनि
अभिमानि, राष्ट्र हामी, जय जय जय नेपाल 

हाम्रो माटो, हाम्रो देश सधैं अमर रहोस्
जन्मभूमि यो, कर्म भूमि यो, शान्ति भुमि यो, मातृ भुमि यो 

सलल सलल बग्छ कर्णाली, यो देश हाम्रो अनि हामी नेपाली 
सलल सलल बग्छ कर्णाली, यो देश हाम्रो अनि हामी नेपाली 
जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल 
जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल ||

नझुक्ने शिर यो, नहटने स्थिर हो,स्वाभिमानी हामी नेपाली 
वीरको गाथाले, रगतको नाताले, अटल र स्वतन्त्र छ 
हो रङ्गबिरङ्गी, यो साझा फूलबारी, अखण्ड छौ हामी नेपाली 

जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल  जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल 
जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल ||

localized.title: Cobweb - Jay Nepal (Official Music Video)
localized.description:
Band : COBWEB
Song : Jay Nepal 
Lyrics : Ashish Gurung, Divesh Mulmi
Studio : Sound Valley Records, Moksh, Musica Music Studio, Kamp22 Studio
Sound Technician : Abhisekh Pun 
Mix and Mastered by Divesh Mulmi

Lyrics:
  
जय नेपाल 

अग्रसिर हिमाल मुनि बसेको हाम्रो छाया
पवित्र हावाले रचेको यो लय 
बुनिएको छ एकतामा हाम्रो सेरोफेरो 
प्राण भन्दा प्यारो, यो देश मेरो

यो हाम्रो देश…चन्द्र र सूर्य, सगरमाथा साक्षी
मेची, कोशी, माहाकाली 

यो हाम्रो भेष…दौरा र सुरुवाल, ढाकाको टोपी 
पहिचान हाम्रो हामी नेपाली 

हो… बहुल जाति, बहुल भाषि, 
बुनिएका छौ एउटै आकाश मुनि
अभिमानि, राष्ट्र हामी, जय जय जय नेपाल 

हाम्रो माटो, हाम्रो देश सधैं अमर रहोस्
जन्मभूमि यो, कर्म भूमि यो, शान्ति भुमि यो, मातृ भुमि यो 

सलल सलल बग्छ कर्णाली, यो देश हाम्रो अनि हामी नेपाली 
सलल सलल बग्छ कर्णाली, यो देश हाम्रो अनि हामी नेपाली 
जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल 
जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल ||

नझुक्ने शिर यो, नहटने स्थिर हो,स्वाभिमानी हामी नेपाली 
वीरको गाथाले, रगतको नाताले, अटल र स्वतन्त्र छ 
हो रङ्गबिरङ्गी, यो साझा फूलबारी, अखण्ड छौ हामी नेपाली 

जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल  जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल 
जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल जय जय जय, जय  जय नेपाल ||


Musicians:
Strings 
Phoebe Shrestha | Roshna Shakya | Pujan Basnet | Prasan Sitaula | Siddhi Sagara Amatya

Cello 
Eileen Thapa | Iva Maharjan 

Dhimey

snippet.title: Full Animation | Free Fire x Jujutsu Kaisen | Free Fire Official
snippet.description:
🔥 Free Fire x Jujutsu Kaisen collaboration is HERE! ⚡Sorcerers and Cursed Spirits collide, and the fight for survival begins! Watch the full animation and join the battle alongside Jujutsu Sorcerers! 💥
14 Jan - 13 Feb
Play Free Fire during the event to collect Cursed Energy and unlock special Jujutsu Kaisen collab items!
· Use Divergent Fist, Unlimited Void, and other jujutsu abilities in BR to turn fights in your favor!
· Head to the Free Fire-style Jujutsu High School and take on special event missions!
· Collect 10 FREE Sukuna Vouchers and spin for the Ryomen Sukuna Bundle, and more iconic Jujutsu Kaisen character bundles ahead!
· Complete missions to earn FREE Yuji Itadori Bundle as the grand prize and unlock an exclusive Battle Card!
· Don’t forget to claim more FREE Jujutsu rewards, including Jujutsu Kaisen Parachute, Banner, Avatar, Monster Truck, Satoru Gojo-themed Gloo Wall, and more!
Event details may vary across regions.

#FreeFirexJujutsuKaisen #FreeFire #JujutsuKaisen

snippet.title: Chadika Jantara - Laxmi Acharya | Suraj Pandit | Shibu G | Mahesh | Paisa Ghimire | New Deuda Song
snippet.description:
Presenting new Nepali song Chadika Jantara by Laxmi Acharya & Suraj Pandit, penned by Suraj Pandit & Hikmat Shahi Kshitiz, composed by Suraj Pandit, featuring Laxmi Acharya, Shibu G, Mahesh Jaishi & Paisa Ghimire only on Laxmi Acharya's official YouTube channel.

Laxmi Acharya Presents: New Nepali Song 2082

snippet.title: YABI - AJAVOLI ft. BLUESSS ( OFFICIAL AUDIO )
snippet.description:
Track 2 from the BOOMERANG mixtape, “Ajavoli” featuring Bluesss, delivers smooth melodies and emotional storytelling. A song about love, reflection, and feelings that never fade, this track shows a softer but powerful side of Yabi The Goat.


Heartfelt thanks to RACHANA DAHAL  for the beautiful back vocals. Your voice added depth, emotion, and soul to this track. Truly grateful for your support and talent.

‘Ajavoli’ is inspired by the original song by Sudip Giri. The emotions, melody, and soul of the original track sparked a new creative direction, allowing this version to reflect personal experiences while honoring the essence and artistry of the original work. Much respect to Sudip Giri for the inspiration.”


℗ 2026 Yabi The Goat. All rights reserved. Unauthorized use or re-upload of this content is prohibited.

snippet.title: I Became a Minecraft Killer
snippet.description:
it's time to ban minecraft's smartest player

I Became a Minecraft Killer

Unstable SMP:
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  @Spokeishere 
➜  @FlameFragsMC 
➜  @wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @ParrotX2 @LettuceK @PurpledMC @Boosfer 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): White Land - Weißes Land https://youtu.be/HxVmYv0PCto by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): The Lonely Mountain - Der Einsame Berg https://youtu.be/4e1smtwtPSA by Simon Autenrieth, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

we wa we wa

श्रीमन नारायण हरी हरी
ॐ नमो भगवते वासुदेवाय
नाम है तेरा तारन हारा
विष्णु अमृतवाणी
विष्णु चालीसा 
कथा गुरुवार की
विष्णु चौपाई कथा
ॐ जय बृहस्पति देवा
हरि आ जाओ एक बार
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे - आरती 

2392-JDVT-AKB

snippet.title: Starting Over Using ONLY ROBUX In Escape Tsunami For Brainrots..
snippet.description:
Today I start over as a noob in escape tsunami for brainrots. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Patra [Official Release]
snippet.description:
Letters within letters to let her know, that in all of my loving she is all I’ve known. For when the night falls, and thoughts surround you and force a conversation, you realise neither time nor space can create distance from her of any kind. And so each day becomes a mere addition to how long you’ve spent missing her. Each morning becomes a promise to face another night, once more, belonging to only her.
___________________________________________
Official release for Sajjan Raj Vaidya's 'Patra'.

snippet.title: Saraswati Ji Ki Aarti | Om Jai Saraswati Mata | Hindu Devotional Song Hindi #sarswatipuja #aarti
snippet.description:
🌼 Saraswati Ji Ki Aarti | Om Jai Saraswati Mata | Hindu Devotional Song Hindi 🌼

ज्ञान, विद्या और बुद्धि की देवी माता सरस्वती को समर्पित यह मधुर और पावन आरती और भजन आपके हृदय और मन को शांति, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और आध्यात्मिक आनंद से भर देती है।
यह आरती विशेष रूप से विद्यार्थियों, शिक्षकों और साधकों के लिए अत्यंत लाभकारी है।

✨ इस आरती की विशेषताएँ:

शुद्ध हिंदी में Saraswati Ji Ki Aarti

विद्या, ज्ञान और विवेक की देवी का स्मरण

बसंत पंचमी और सरस्वती पूजा के लिए उपयुक्त

मन और आत्मा को शांति और ऊर्जा देने वाली भक्ति

🕉️ आरती मंत्र:
ॐ जय सरस्वती माता, मैया जय सरस्वती माता…

🙏 इस आरती के माध्यम से माता सरस्वती का आशीर्वाद प्राप्त करें और अपने जीवन में ज्ञान, सफलता और सद्बुद्धि का प्रकाश फैलाएँ।

Saraswati Ji Ki Aarti, Om Jai Saraswati Mata, Hindu Devotional Song Hindi, Saraswati Aarti, Saraswati Bhajan, Saraswati Aarti Hindi, Mata Saraswati Aarti, Maa Saraswati Aarti, Saraswati Puja Aarti, Basant Panchami Aarti, Vasant Panchami Aarti, Saraswati Puja Song, Devotional Aarti, Bhakti Aarti, Indian Devotional Song, Goddess Saraswati Song, Saraswati Ji Bhakti, Vidya Ki Devi Saraswati, Knowledge Goddess Saraswati, Saraswati Aarti YouTube, Saraswati Bhakti Geet, Saraswati Aarti Full, Saraswati Aarti Audio, Saraswati Aarti Video

#SaraswatiPuja #Aarti #SaraswatiAarti #OmJaiSaraswatiMata #HindiAarti #Bhakti #MataSaraswati #SaraswatiBhajan #VidyaKiDevi #KnowledgeGoddess #DevotionalSong

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
